creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
delphij     2008-07-27 07:40:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt/porttools Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/porttools/files patch-util_diff.in 
  Log:
  When doing 'update' and 'diff', use our cvs(1)'s -R feature, this would accelerate
  on certain configurations.
  
  While I'm there, make use of 'SF' macro for SourceForge mirror.
  
  PR:     ports/116248
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.21      +2 -2      ports/ports-mgmt/porttools/Makefile
  1.3       +20 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/porttools/files/patch-util_diff.in (new)
